description.value: OSR Jewellers is an exquisite online destination for fine jewelry, offering a diverse collection that blends traditional elegance with contemporary design. From stunning diamond and pure silver necklace sets to intricately crafted gold-plated and Kundan earrings, they provide a wide array of adornments for every occasion. Based out of Delhi, OSR Jewellers is dedicated to delivering quality craftsmanship and beautiful pieces to enhance personal style.

media_assets.product_name: Yellow Opal Diamond Classic Necklace Set

visual_features.color_appearance: Colorless/Near-colorless (for white stones), Fancy Yellow (for pear-shaped stones)
visual_features.size_impression: Small (for round brilliants), Medium (for pear-shaped drops)
visual_features.setting_or_mounting: Prong set, forming a necklace and dangle earrings
visual_features.presentation: Model wearing the jewelry, against a plain light background
visual_features.additional_visual_notes: The set features numerous small colorless stones and larger pear-shaped yellow stones, creating a striking contrast. The necklace has a tiered, bib-like design.

media_assets.visual_description: The image displays a woman wearing an elaborate necklace and matching dangle earrings. The necklace features multiple rows of small, colorless round brilliant stones forming a collar, with several pear-shaped yellow stones suspended as drops along the bottom edge. The matching earrings mirror this design with colorless round brilliant stones leading to a single pear-shaped yellow drop. The jewelry is presented against a plain light grey background, highlighting its intricate design and vibrant yellow accents.
media_assets.media_alt_text: A woman models an elaborate necklace and matching dangle earrings featuring colorless round brilliant stones and fancy yellow pear-shaped drops.

media_assets.product_name: Yellow Diamond Silver Plated Necklace Set

visual_features.setting_or_mounting: necklace / drop earrings / prong set / pave set
visual_features.additional_visual_notes: The set includes a matching necklace and earrings. The design features a central yellow stone surrounded by a halo of smaller colorless stones.

media_assets.visual_description: A silver-toned necklace and matching drop earrings are displayed against a plain white background. The necklace features a prominent rectangular yellow gemstone pendant surrounded by smaller colorless stones, with the chain adorned by additional smaller yellow and colorless stones. The earrings mirror the pendant's design, each featuring a rectangular yellow gemstone surrounded by colorless accent stones.
media_assets.media_alt_text: A silver-toned necklace and matching drop earrings featuring fancy yellow emerald-cut gemstones with colorless accents.

media_assets.product_name: White Ruby & Green Jadau Chand Bali

visual_features.shape_visible: chand bali (crescent/hoop), floral motifs, teardrop pearls
visual_features.additional_visual_notes: Intricate traditional design, multiple small red and green stones, numerous pearl drops, likely Kundan or Jadau style.

media_assets.visual_description: A pair of ornate gold-toned chand bali earrings is displayed against a plain white background. Each earring features a crescent-shaped hoop adorned with intricate patterns of small red and green stones, with a central floral motif and numerous cream-colored pearl drops dangling from the bottom edge. The overall design suggests traditional Indian jewelry with a rich, colorful aesthetic.
media_assets.media_alt_text: A pair of ornate gold chand bali earrings with red and green stones, and dangling cream pearl drops, on a white background.

media_assets.visual_description: The image displays a pair of floral-design stud earrings against a plain white background. Each earring features five petals paved with small, colorless/white stones, surrounding a center composed of smaller, teardrop-shaped pink/ruby-colored stones arranged around a single central colorless stone. The metal setting appears to be a polished gold tone.
media_assets.media_alt_text: A pair of gold-toned floral stud earrings with pave-set white stones on petals and pink teardrop stones around a central white stone.

visual_features.additional_visual_notes: Intricate filigree details, multiple clear stones, small white pearls, and red bead drops.

media_assets.visual_description: A pair of ornate gold-toned chandelier earrings is displayed against a plain white background. Each earring features a fan-like structure adorned with numerous bezel-set, clear, teardrop-shaped stones, intricate filigree work, and small white pearls. Dangling from the bottom are multiple deep red, elongated bead drops, adding a vibrant contrast to the gold and clear elements.
media_assets.media_alt_text: A pair of ornate gold-toned chandelier earrings with clear teardrop stones, small pearls, and deep red bead drops on white background.

visual_features.additional_visual_notes: textured gold edges, multiple stones per earring

media_assets.visual_description: The image displays a pair of gold-toned half-hoop earrings, each adorned with multiple clear, round-cut stones bezel-set along its curved surface. The earrings feature a textured, beaded edge and a post-back closure, presented against a clean, plain white background. The overall impression is one of traditional elegance and good craftsmanship.
media_assets.media_alt_text: A pair of gold-toned half-hoop earrings, each featuring multiple bezel-set clear round stones and textured edges, on a white background.

visual_features.additional_visual_notes: Matching pair of two earrings, textured metal border around the bezel.

media_assets.visual_description: The image displays a pair of gold-toned stud earrings, each featuring a large, irregularly shaped, clear gemstone set in a textured bezel. The gemstones exhibit a high degree of transparency and reflect light, appearing colorless. The earrings are presented against a plain white background, suggesting a studio product shot.
media_assets.media_alt_text: A pair of gold-toned stud earrings with irregular, clear gemstones set in textured gold bezels on a white background.

visual_features.shape_visible: oval (for green stones and necklace links), teardrop (for pearls), chandelier (for earrings)

visual_features.size_impression: medium (for individual green stones), large (for overall necklace and earrings)
visual_features.additional_visual_notes: traditional Indian jewelry style, features multiple green stones and pearls, adjustable necklace cord visible

media_assets.visual_description: A smiling woman with dark hair pulled back models an ornate gold necklace and matching chandelier earrings. The jewelry features numerous small, oval-shaped green stones, likely emeralds, set within intricate gold frames, accented by dangling white pearls. The background is a soft, light cream color, suggesting an indoor lifestyle setting.
media_assets.media_alt_text: Smiling woman wearing an ornate gold necklace and matching chandelier earrings with green stones and white pearls.

visual_features.shape_visible: V-shape for the necklace, chandelier/drop shape for the earrings, various small geometric shapes for the stones/enamel
visual_features.size_impression: necklace is a medium-sized collar/choker, earrings are medium-sized drops
visual_features.additional_visual_notes: intricate traditional design, multiple small pearls, colored gemstones or enamel work

media_assets.visual_description: The image features a smiling woman wearing an intricate multi-color necklace and matching drop earrings. The jewelry set appears to be crafted from gold-toned metal, adorned with small red, green, and blue gemstones or enamel, and accented with numerous small white/cream pearls. The woman is wearing a light-colored saree or traditional attire, and the background is a soft, light studio setting with visible softbox lighting.
media_assets.media_alt_text: Smiling woman wearing an ornate gold-toned multi-color necklace and matching drop earrings with pearls and colored stones.

visual_features.clarity_appearance: main stones appear eye-clean, smaller stones are too small to assess precisely but appear bright
visual_features.size_impression: main stones on pendant and earrings are large (likely >2ct equivalent if they were diamonds), overall set is substantial
visual_features.setting_or_mounting: necklace, earrings, stones appear prong or bezel set within intricate metalwork
visual_features.additional_visual_notes: intricate antique design, multi-colored accent stones, large central yellowish-orange stones

media_assets.visual_description: A smiling female model is shown from the chest up, wearing an intricate antique gold-toned necklace set. The necklace is a wide choker style with a central pendant featuring a large yellowish-orange oval stone, surrounded by smaller colorless stones. The necklace itself is adorned with rows of colorless stones and small multi-colored accent stones (red, green, blue, yellow), while matching drop earrings with similar yellowish-orange oval stones and multi-colored accents complete the set. The background is a plain, light, neutral color, and the model is wearing a light-colored saree.
media_assets.media_alt_text: Smiling model wearing an antique gold-toned necklace set with a large yellowish-orange oval stone pendant and matching earrings.

visual_features.shape_visible: pear, oval, round, various cabochon shapes
visual_features.color_appearance: multi-color (green, red, brown, cream, blue, clear)

visual_features.size_impression: necklace is medium to large, earrings are medium
visual_features.additional_visual_notes: intricate floral/leafy design with small clear and colored accent stones, surrounding larger multi-colored cabochon stones

media_assets.visual_description: The image features a smiling woman of South Asian descent wearing a multi-colored necklace and matching dangle earrings. The necklace is adorned with various large, polished cabochon gemstones in shades of green, red, brown, and cream, interspersed with intricate gold-toned settings featuring small, clear accent stones and tiny colored gems. The background is a plain, light beige color, and the woman is wearing a light-colored traditional garment.
media_assets.media_alt_text: Smiling woman wearing an antique gold-plated necklace and matching earrings with multi-colored cabochon gemstones.

visual_features.additional_visual_notes: clear top lid, multiple ring slots, 'Ring' label visible, metal clasps and corner protectors

media_assets.visual_description: The image displays an open, rectangular jewelry organizer box designed for rings. The box is black with a textured, possibly faux leather, exterior and features a clear, transparent lid held open by a black ribbon. Inside, the bottom compartment has multiple padded black slots, clearly labeled with a silver-colored 'Ring' tag on the front edge, indicating its purpose. The box has silver-toned metal clasps and corner protectors, presented against a plain white studio background with some reflections visible in the clear lid.
media_assets.media_alt_text: Open black rectangular jewelry organizer box with a clear lid, showing multiple padded slots for rings and silver-toned hardware.

visual_features.additional_visual_notes: The ring features a central pearl with a halo of small accent stones and a textured, possibly beaded, band. The model is wearing traditional embroidered clothing.

media_assets.visual_description: The image displays a hand wearing a gold-colored ring featuring a prominent round white pearl surrounded by a halo of smaller, sparkling stones. The ring has a textured band.
